project.name: IAP: Institutional Authorization Platform
project.description: IAP is a software tool for streamlining research proposal authorization.

requirePluginVersions.message: Best Practice is to always define plugin versions!

property.name: excludedPackages
property.value: java.io, java.math, java.text, java.util, java.util.concurrent, java.util.concurrent.atomic, java.util.function, java.util.stream, javax.annotation, javax.inject, javax.servlet, org.apache.commons.collections4, org.apache.commons.lang3, org.json, org.slf4j, org.xwiki.component.annotation, org.apache.sling.servlets.annotations, org.osgi.service.component.annotations

property.name: tokens
property.value: IMPORT, STATIC_IMPORT, MODULE_IMPORT, CLASS_DEF, INTERFACE_DEF, ENUM_DEF, STATIC_INIT, INSTANCE_INIT, METHOD_DEF, CTOR_DEF, RECORD_DEF, COMPACT_CTOR_DEF

property.name: tokens
property.value: BNOT, DEC, DOT, INC, LNOT, UNARY_MINUS, UNARY_PLUS

property.name: tokens
property.value: IMPORT, STATIC_IMPORT, MODULE_IMPORT, CLASS_DEF, INTERFACE_DEF, ENUM_DEF, STATIC_INIT, INSTANCE_INIT, METHOD_DEF, CTOR_DEF, RECORD_DEF, COMPACT_CTOR_DEF

property.name: tokens
property.value: BNOT, DEC, DOT, INC, LNOT, UNARY_MINUS, UNARY_PLUS
